complaint: Whenever I turn on the heat or AC, there's a loud rattling and buzzing noise behind the dash like a fan is grinding itself to pieces. It's getting worse and the noise really worries me.
observations: Noise tracks directly with blower fan speed setting and stops when blower is off
Debris and a partially shredded leaf visible at the blower motor cage intake
Blower motor bearing exhibits a slight wobble when spun by hand
provenance: Scenario: blind subagent (overcall-probe-v1, blind to held severity diff/anchors/existing cases). Severity+cost: Kai domain review 2026-06-13 (drive/don't-drive rule; sourced market cost). Diagnosis slug proposed from repair_target 'HVAC blower motor and cabin air filter replacement'.
